title: Top-up to Child Development Account (CDA)
text:

Top-up to Child Development Account (CDA)
Share link
One-off $400 top-up to Child Development Account (CDA) for Singapore Citizens aged 0 to 6 from September 2023.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
One-off $400 top-up to Child Development Account (CDA) for Singapore Citizens aged 0 to 6 in 2023
Top-up will be credited from September 2023
Eligible child must open a CDA by 30 June 2024
Collapse all sections
About this support

$400 top-up to Child Development Account (CDA) for Singapore Citizens aged 0 to 6 from September 2023

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen child born between 1 Jan 2017 and 31 Dec 2023 (both dates inclusive).

Children born on 1 Jan 2017 who have started primary school in 2023 will receive the Edusave top-up instead.

Eligible child must open a CDA by 30 June 2024.

How to apply?

Eligible child must open a CDA by 30 June 2024. You can open a CDA with DBS Bank, OCBC or UOB.

Where can I find help?

View more details

MSF Consolidated Hotline: 1800 111 2222 

(say ‘Baby Bonus’ when asked for the hotline you want to reach)




Operating hours: Mon to Fri 8.30am to 6pm | Saturday: 8.30am to 1pm

(Closed on Public Holidays)

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines




Overseas:  +6562537707

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry through Ask Baby Bonus

Scheme last updated 27 Nov 2025
